name: Geetesh
tagline: Crafting modern web experiences with strong visual hierarchy, responsive engineering, and conversion-focused UX.
summary: Front-end and product-focused developer with experience in designing, building, and shipping portfolio websites, dashboards, and marketing experiences. I specialize in React, UI systems, and user-centered visual design.

about.text: I design interfaces with product goals in mind, then build them in code with clean architecture and performance-aware implementation. My process blends UX research, wireframing, component-driven design, and production-quality React development.

experienceLead: Professional journey building and shipping high-impact digital products

points: Led end-to-end UX for B2B SaaS dashboards and improved workflow completion by 24%
Built design system foundations with reusable components and design tokens
Collaborated with engineering teams to convert prototypes into production React interfaces

experience.title: Front-End Developer
points: Developed reusable component libraries that reduced frontend build time
Implemented responsive marketing pages and web apps with strong Lighthouse metrics
Partnered with designers to ensure pixel-accurate UI and accessibility compliance
